preReview.title: San Diego FC vs. San Jose Earthquakes: Varas quiere que la sensación de fortaleza continúe en los playoffs
preReview.description: San Diego FC podría terminar con el mejor récord de la MLS en su temporada de debut, antes de recibir a San Jose Earthquakes.

preReview.title: San Diego FC v San Jose Earthquakes: Varas wants fortress feeling to continue into playoffs
preReview.description: San Diego FC could still finish with the best record in MLS in their franchise season, ahead of hosting the San Jose Earthquakes.

preReview.title: San Diego FC v San Jose Earthquakes: Varas vuole continuare il dominio fino ai playoff
preReview.description: San Diego FC potrebbe ancora chiudere con il miglior record nella MLS nella stagione della loro franchigia, in vista di ospitare i San Jose Earthquakes.

preReview.title: San Diego FC x San Jose Earthquakes: Varas quer manter sensação de fortaleza nos playoffs
preReview.description: O San Diego FC ainda pode terminar com o melhor desempenho na MLS em sua temporada de estreia, antes de receber o San Jose Earthquakes.

preReview.title: San Diego FC v San Jose Earthquakes : Varas veut que l'impression de forteresse se poursuive en playoffs
preReview.description: San Diego FC pourrait encore terminer avec le meilleur bilan en MLS lors de leur saison inaugurale, avant de recevoir les San Jose Earthquakes.

preReview.title: San Diego FC gegen San Jose Earthquakes: Varas will Festung-Feeling in die Playoffs mitnehmen
preReview.description: San Diego FC könnte immer noch in ihrer Franchise-Saison die beste Bilanz der MLS erzielen, bevor sie die San Jose Earthquakes empfangen.

preReview.title: سان دييغو إف سي ضد سان خوسيه إيرثكويكس: فاراس يريد الحفاظ على شعور القلعة إلى الأدوار الإقصائية
preReview.description: يمكن لسان دييغو إف سي أن ينهي موسمهم الأول في الدوري الأمريكي بأفضل سجل، قبل استضافة سان خوسيه إيرثكويكس.

preReview.title: San Diego FC x San Jose Earthquakes: Varas quer sensação de fortaleza para continuar nos playoffs
preReview.description: San Diego FC ainda pode terminar com o melhor recorde na MLS em sua temporada de estreia, antes de receber o San Jose Earthquakes.

QAData.question: Who won between San Diego FC and San Jose Earthquakes on Sun, 28 Sep 2025 02:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: San Jose Earthquakes won 1–0 over San Diego FC on Sun, 28 Sep 2025 02:30:00 GMT.
